name: Asian Phytoceuticals Public Company Limited
summary: Asian Phytoceuticals Public Company Limited engages in the research and development, manufacture, and distribution of health and natural beauty products in Thailand. Its products include dietary supplements, cosmetics, and personal care products that are developed from natural plant and botanical extracts. The company also provides slimming, anti-wrinkle and anti-spots, skin care, and fat reduction products, as well as products for balancing immunity. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Natural Cosmetics Research Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Asian Phytoceuticals Public Company Limited in July 2005. Asian Phytoceuticals Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Lamphun, Thailand.
